# Test Fixtures

`.wpress` fixtures for compatibility and edge-case testing.

Most fixtures are generated in-test (see `Ai1wmCompatibilityTest.php`) rather than committed as binary blobs — this keeps the repo small and the format transparent.

If you need to commit a real ai1wm-generated archive (e.g., a sanitized small site export), name it `real-ai1wm-<label>.wpress` and document it here.
